probe.l1_install: command -v openclaw && openclaw plugins list 2>/dev/null | grep -q vertexai-memorybank
probe.l3_functional: openclaw plugins run openclaw-vertexai-memorybank memorybank-stats 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'count'

install_hint: openclaw plugins install openclaw-vertexai-memorybank (requires GCP project)
